airline and hotel vendor preferences, cancellation
and update frequency, and so on.

div.div: Accuracy of correct identified travel-related emails: The email polling system should accurately identify travel-related emails based on the input parameters.

ul.li: False Positives (non-travel-related emails incorrectly identified as travel-related).
True Negatives (non-travel-related emails correctly identified as non-travel-related).
False Negatives (travel-related emails incorrectly classified as non-travel-related).
